11101010101011111100100100011000000010110110 - ASI: 22

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  010 = 01 * 0
  110 = 11 * 0
  111 = 1 * 11
  0101 = 01 * 01
  00010 = 00 * 010
  01000 = 01 * 000
  01111 = 01 * 111
  110000 = 110 * 000
  110010 = 110 * 010
  110110 = 110 * 110
  1110101 = 111 * 0101
  00010110110 = 00010 * 110110
  01000110000 = 01000 * 110000
  01111110010 = 01111 * 110010
  11101010101 = 1110101 * 0101
  0100011000000010110110 = 01000110000 * 00010110110
  1110101010101111110010 = 11101010101 * 01111110010
  11101010101011111100100100011000000010110110 = 1110101010101111110010 * 0100011000000010110110
